title: The Story Begins
text: On this page the story begins, with some background information. But now you must make a choice!

title: South Hallway
text: You are in a corridor that goes on forever. You start walking, but never stop. The End.

title: North Hallway
text: After turning right, you hope to see something of interest. Unfortunately, your world fades to black and you can sense nothing in any direction. The End.

title: Still Beginning
text: You figure it is safer to stay put. After waiting for a long time (it must be centuries), you figure you better do something!
